  4â†’import androidx.biometric.BiometricManager
  5â†’import androidx.biometric.BiometricPrompt
  6â†’import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
  7â†’import androidx.compose.runtime.DisposableEffect
  8â†’import androidx.compose.runtime.getValue
  9â†’import androidx.compose.runtime.mutableStateOf
 10â†’import androidx.compose.runtime.saveable.rememberSaveable
 11â†’import androidx.compose.runtime.setValue
 12â†’import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
 13â†’import androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
 14â†’import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity
 15â†’import app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.designsystem.atom.textfield.TextFieldOutlinedPassword
 16â†’
 17â†’/**
 18â†’ * Variant of [TextFieldOutlinedPassword] that only allows the password to be unmasked after the user has authenticated
 19â†’ * using [BiometricPrompt].
 20â†’ *
 21â†’ * Note: Due to limitations of [BiometricPrompt] this composable can only be used inside a [FragmentActivity].
 22â†’ */
 23â†’@Suppress("LongParameterList")
 24â†’@Composable
 25â†’fun TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric(
 26â†’    value: String,
 27â†’    onValueChange: (String) -> Unit,
 28â†’    authenticationTitle: String,
 29â†’    authenticationSubtitle: String,
 30â†’    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 31â†’    onWarningChange: (CharSequence?) -> Unit,
 32â†’    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
 33â†’    label: String? = null,
 34â†’    isEnabled: Boolean = true,
 35â†’    isReadOnly: Boolean = false,
 36â†’    isRequired: Boolean = false,
 37â†’    hasError: Boolean = false,
 38â†’) {
 39â†’    var isPasswordVisible by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 40â†’    var isAuthenticated by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(false) }
 41â†’    var isAuthenticationRequired by rememberSaveable { mutableStateOf(true) }
 42â†’
 43â†’    // If the entire password was removed, we allow the user to unmask the text field without requiring authentication.
 44â†’    if (value.isEmpty()) {
 45â†’        isAuthenticationRequired = false
 46â†’    }
 47â†’
 48â†’    val activity = LocalActivity.current as FragmentActivity
 49â†’
 50â†’    TextFieldOutlinedPassword(
 51â†’        value = value,
 52â†’        onValueChange = onValueChange,
 53â†’        modifier = modifier,
 54â†’        label = label,
 55â†’        isEnabled = isEnabled,
 56â†’        isReadOnly = isReadOnly,
 57â†’        isRequired = isRequired,
 58â†’        hasError = hasError,
 59â†’        isPasswordVisible = isPasswordVisible,
 60â†’        onPasswordVisibilityToggleClicked = {
 61â†’            if (!isAuthenticationRequired || isAuthenticated) {
 62â†’                isPasswordVisible = !isPasswordVisible
 63â†’                activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 64â†’            } else {
 65â†’                showBiometricPrompt(
 66â†’                    activity,
 67â†’                    authenticationTitle,
 68â†’                    authenticationSubtitle,
 69â†’                    needScreenLockMessage,
 70â†’                    onAuthSuccess = {
 71â†’                        isAuthenticated = true
 72â†’                        isPasswordVisible = true
 73â†’                        onWarningChange(null)
 74â†’                        activity.setSecure(true)
 75â†’                    },
 76â†’                    onAuthError = onWarningChange,
 77â†’                )
 78â†’            }
 79â†’        },
 80â†’    )
 81â†’
 82â†’    DisposableEffect(key1 = "secureWindow") {
 83â†’        activity.setSecure(isPasswordVisible)
 84â†’
 85â†’        onDispose {
 86â†’            activity.setSecure(false)
 87â†’        }
 88â†’    }
 89â†’}
 90â†’
 91â†’private fun showBiometricPrompt(
 92â†’    activity: FragmentActivity,
 93â†’    title: String,
 94â†’    subtitle: String,
 95â†’    needScreenLockMessage: String,
 96â†’    onAuthSuccess: () -> Unit,
 97â†’    onAuthError: (CharSequence) -> Unit,
 98â†’) {
 99â†’    val authenticationCallback = object : BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationCallback() {
100â†’        override fun onAuthenticationSucceeded(result: BiometricPrompt.AuthenticationResult) {
101â†’            onAuthSuccess()
102â†’        }
103â†’
104â†’        override fun onAuthenticationError(errorCode: Int, errString: CharSequence) {
105â†’            if (errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_HW_NOT_PRESENT ||
106â†’                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_DEVICE_CREDENTIAL ||
107â†’                errorCode == BiometricPrompt.ERROR_NO_BIOMETRICS
108â†’            ) {
109â†’                onAuthError(needScreenLockMessage)
110â†’            } else if (errString.isNotEmpty()) {
111â†’                onAuthError(errString)
112â†’            }
113â†’        }
114â†’    }
115â†’
116â†’    val promptInfo = BiometricPrompt.PromptInfo.Builder()
117â†’        .setAllowedAuthenticators(
118â†’            BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_STRONG or
119â†’                BiometricManager.Authenticators.BIOMETRIC_WEAK or
120â†’                BiometricManager.Authenticators.DEVICE_CREDENTIAL,
121â†’        )
122â†’        .setTitle(title)
123â†’        .setSubtitle(subtitle)
124â†’        .build()
125â†’
126â†’    BiometricPrompt(activity, authenticationCallback).authenticate(promptInfo)
127â†’}
128â†’
129â†’private fun FragmentActivity.setSecure(secure: Boolean) {
130â†’    window.setFlags(if (secure) WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE else 0, WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SECURE)
131â†’}

18â†’@Composable
19â†’internal fun ContributionScreen(
20â†’    onBack: () -> Unit,
21â†’    modifier: Modifier = Modifier,
22â†’    viewModel: ViewModel = koinViewModel<ContributionViewModel>(),
23â†’) {
24â†’    val activity = LocalActivity.current
25â†’    val context = LocalContext.current
26â†’
27â†’    val (state, dispatch) = viewModel.observe { effect ->
28â†’        when (effect) {
29â†’            is ContributionContract.Effect.ManageSubscription -> {
30â†’                context.startActivity(
31â†’                    getManageSubscriptionIntent(
32â†’                        productId = effect.productId,
33â†’                        packageName = context.packageName,
34â†’                    ),
35â†’                )
36â†’            }
37â†’
38â†’            is ContributionContract.Effect.PurchaseContribution -> {
39â†’                effect.startPurchaseFlow(activity)
40â†’            }
41â†’        }
42â†’    }
43â†’
44â†’    BackHandler {

46â†’    }
47â†’
48â†’    Scaffold(
49â†’        modifier = modifier,
50â†’        topBar = {
51â†’            TopAppBarWithBackButton(

53â†’                onBackClick = onBack,
54â†’            )
55â†’        },
56â†’    ) { innerPadding ->
57â†’        ContributionContent(
58â†’            state = state.value,
59â†’            onEvent = { dispatch(it) },
60â†’            contentPadding = innerPadding,
61â†’        )
62â†’    }
63â†’}
64â†’
65â†’private const val SUBSCRIPTION_URL = "https://play.google.com/store/account/subscriptions"
66â†’
67â†’private fun getManageSubscriptionIntent(
68â†’    productId: String,
69â†’    packageName: String,
70â†’): Intent {
71â†’    val uri = Uri.parse(SUBSCRIPTION_URL)
72â†’        .buildUpon()
73â†’        .appendQueryParameter("sku", productId)
74â†’        .appendQueryParameter("package", packageName)
75â†’        .build()
76â†’
77â†’    return Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, uri)
78â†’}

content.text:
Here's what was done to resolve the issue:

1. **Bump AndroidX Activity to 1.10.1**  
   - Updated `androidxActivity` version to `1.10.1` in `gradle/libs.versions.toml`.

2. **Replace custom LocalActivity with official implementation**  
   - Updated all usages and imports of `app.k9mail.core.ui.compose.common.activity.LocalActivity` to use the new official `androidx.activity.compose.LocalActivity`:
     - In:  
       - `feature/launcher/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/launcher/navigation/FeatureLauncherNavHost.kt`
       - `feature/launcher/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/launcher/ui/FeatureLauncherApp.kt`
       - `feature/settings/import/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/settings/import/ui/SettingsImportScreen.kt`
       - `feature/account/server/settings/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/account/server/settings/ui/common/TextFieldOutlinedPasswordBiometric.kt`
       - `feature/account/server/settings/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/account/server/settings/ui/common/ClientCertificateInput.kt`
       - `feature/funding/googleplay/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/feature/funding/googleplay/ui/contribution/ContributionScreen.kt`
     - Replaced import statements and usage to use the official `LocalActivity`.

   - Deprecated the old custom `LocalActivity` definition in `core/ui/compose/common/src/main/kotlin/app/k9mail/core/ui/compose/common/activity/LocalActivity.kt` with comments, so all code now uses the Jetpack version.

3. **Validation**  
   - All affected files were checked for linter errors; no issues found.

**You may wish to remove the deprecated custom LocalActivity file in the future. The project now correctly uses the new Jetpack implementation and the updated dependency.**
  
The codebase is now up to date with AndroidX Activity 1.10.1 and the official LocalActivity. No breaking changes detected in usage patterns.
